ops.title: Document parallel per-host cookiesync pattern in agent-browser-with-cookies skill
ops.description: Extend (not replace) the `Multiple domains` note in `plugins/agent-browser-with-cookies/skills/agent-browser-with-cookies/SKILL.md` (cc-skills repo, ~lines 203-206) with the parallel fan-out pattern: coordinator primes with one `cookiesync auth` carrying the full host list in `--reason`, then each parallel agent pulls only its own host into its own `agent-browser --session <slug>` — the shared per-session Touch ID grant ("One session, one tap", ~218-222) keeps the whole fan-out at one tap. The one-session merge stays documented for single-task multi-host flows. Follow the repo's version-bump/changelog convention (check git log). Prompted by getaway's serial browser-read rewrite (plan: look-at-the-last-binary-token.md, getaway session d7816cb6).

ops.text: SKILL.md Multiple-domains note documents both patterns: one-session merge AND parallel per-host sessions with coordinator-primed auth
slop-cop check passes on the touched SKILL.md
Change committed and pushed in cc-skills with CI green, following that repo's version-bump convention
